DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-12-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NEREYDA CARDENAS'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Thomas J. Feeney of the Law Offices of MacMorris & Carbone (510.267.7273) for defendant and moving party. No other appearances. Discussed and the court modified its ruling as follows: sustain without leave to amend, no opposition filed. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEFENDANT NEREYDA DEL TORO CARDENAS'S MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE AND VACATING DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND GRANTING DEFENDANT LEAVE TO DEFEND.

APPEARANCES: Thomas J. Feeney, Esq. of Law Offices of MacMorris & Carbone 510/267-7273 for deft & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Motion to set aside default and default judgment are granted. Defendant must file a responsive pleading within 3 days. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
